articles.title: TS Inter supplementary exam 2026: Not even half of second year general streams students passed exam, check details here
articles.description: The Telangana Intermediate Supplementary Results 2026 revealed a worrying trend in the second-year General stream, where the pass percentage remained below 50 per cent despite students getting another opportunity to clear subjects. While first-year candidates showed improvement and girls continued to outperform boys, the results highlighted persistent academic challenges among second-year students.

articles.title: Viral Video: 58-Year-Old Grandma Of 14 Started Weight Lifting 'By Accident' At 55, Defies Ageing
articles.description: The grandmother of 14 posted her transformation on Instagram, detailing how she began working out at 55 despite dealing with multiple health issues

articles.title: More than 30 kg heroin recovered in Punjab; six held
articles.description: Punjab Police recover over 30 kg heroin and arrest six linked to a cross-border drug smuggling cartel.

articles.title: 'She uncovered his affair, secret Rs 2.5-cr loan': Punjab doctor 'who helped fund' husband's eye hospital found dead
articles.description: A doctor's husband, an eye surgeon, faces charges of abetting suicide after his wife was found dead. Her parents allege extramarital affairs, violence, and a massive Rs 2.5 crore loan taken in her name without consent. The couple had been living separately following alleged assault attempts and threats.

articles.title: EXCLUSIVE: Heer Sara's Director Kartik Chaudhry Reveals Why Patralekhaa-Maanvi Gagroo Were Perfect For Role
articles.description: This is an exclusive interview with Kartik Chaudhry, director of the upcoming film 'Heer Sara.' He discusses the film's origins, following two women on a motorcycle journey of self-discovery to Pondicherry, and delves into its deeper themes of emotional healing and mental health beyond the feel-good travel narrative.

articles.title: Nagaland Lottery Sambad result out today (11-06-2026); check Rs 1 crore prize winning number and full list here
articles.description: The Nagaland State Lottery Sambad Dear Thursday Weekly Draw results are coming soon. Ticket holders can check the winning numbers online. Winners need to keep their original tickets safe. The prize claim process requires specific documents. Buy tickets from authorized sellers and verify results through official channels. Participate responsibly.

articles.title: Two missing Indian seafarers confirmed dead in US tanker attack near Oman: Govt official
articles.description: The MT Settebello was carrying 24 Indian crew members when it was struck earlier this week, triggering a search and rescue operation.

articles.title: As India ages, healthcare must evolve, embrace the silver economy
articles.description: India’s silver economy is expected to grow to $30-50 billion over the next decade

articles.title: DGCA Bribery Scandal: Major Corruption Allegations Trigger Fresh Regulatory Scrutiny | News18
articles.description: A major corruption scandal has reportedly surfaced within the DGCA, with allegations of bribery and irregularities triggering fresh scrutiny into aviation regulatory processes and oversight mechanisms. n18oc_india

articles.title: After Shah Rukh Khan Katrina Kaif cheers for Alia Bhatt and Alpha: ‘Looking fire’
articles.description: Yash Raj Films releases the teaser for Alpha, showcasing Alia Bhatt as a spy. The film also stars Sharvari and Bobby Deol.

articles.title: Rs 25,000 ATM withdrawal, but Rs 50,000 debit shown: Man wins Rs 30k court relief
articles.description: Surinder Kumar, who had an account with Union Bank, attempted multiple cash withdrawals on November 27, 2015, using ATM machines operated by ICICI Bank and HDFC Bank.

articles.title: Singapore PM Wong hails Modi's milestone, vows to deepen SG-India ties
articles.description: Singapore's PM Lawrence Wong congratulated PM Narendra Modi on becoming India's longest-serving elected Prime Minister, praising his leadership and looking forward to strengthening bilateral ties and creating new opportunities for their people.

articles.title: NITI Aayog meeting: CMs Revanth Reddy, Naidu, Vijay arrive in Delhi
articles.description: CMs Revanth Reddy, Chandrababu Naidu and Vijay have arrived in Delhi for the 11th NITI Aayog meeting, chaired by PM Modi. Vijay also met President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi and other leaders. The meeting's theme is 'Inclusive Human Development'.

articles.title: Kerala Lottery Result Today Live: Karunya Plus KN-627 Winning Numbers For June 11, 2026; First Prize Rs 1 Crore
articles.description: Kerala Lottery Result Today Live: Here’s guessing numbers of Karunya Plus KN-627 lottery for Thursday, June 11. Check the live updates and full list of winning numbers from 3 pm.

articles.title: PM Modi's tenure: Dilip Ghosh lauds PM, says Congress 'troubled'
articles.description: West Bengal Minister Dilip Ghosh lauded PM Modi's tenure, stating people are happy while the Congress is 'troubled'. The remark came after Congress's Mallikarjun Kharge criticised BJP's claims, accusing them of distorting history.

articles.title: Gujarat: Cyber fraud ring busted in Kutch, Rs 44 cr transactions found
articles.description: East Kutch Police, under 'Operation Mule Hunt 2.0', have busted a cyber fraud syndicate, uncovering transactions worth Rs 44 crore across 105 mule accounts. Four arrests have been made, with the network's operations traced across India and Sri Lanka.

articles.title: Deendayal Port Kandla sees 25% jump in LPG cargo handling in FY26
articles.description: Deendayal Port Authority, Kandla, reported a 25% YoY growth in LPG cargo handling for FY 2025-26. The port managed 133 LPG vessels and 2.61 MMT of cargo, strengthening India's maritime and energy logistics ecosystem.

articles.title: Hindalco, Vedanta, Nalco shares in focus as anti-dumping duty on aluminium foil extended
articles.description: Shares of Hindalco, Vedanta and PSU National Aluminium Company Limited (Nalco) ended up to 4% lower on Wednesday.

articles.title: Niall Horan Reveals 'Dinner Party' Tracks Were Written About Girlfriend Amelia & Liam Payne | N18G
articles.description: Niall Horan is ready to invite fans into his world with 'Dinner Party', an album packed with 12 brand-new tracks and plenty of heart. The singer revealed that the project began with the title track, inspired by the night he met his girlfriend Amelia Woolley. Horan also pays tribute to his late One Direction bandmate Liam Payne with the poignant closing track 'End Of An Era'. Watch the video to know more about the stories behind the album.#NiallHoran #dinnerparty #LiamPayne

articles.title: Chennai Ration Card Camp On June 13: Name Addition, Address Change And Mobile Update Services Available
articles.description: Chennai residents can avail ration card services, including name addition, address changes, and mobile number updates at special Public Distribution System grievance camps across the city on June 13.

articles.title: Trump Weighs Short, Large-Scale Military Operation Against Iran At White House Meeting: Report
articles.description: The proposal was reportedly discussed as Trump met with senior national security officials amid a rapidly deteriorating security situation in West Asia.

articles.title: Prosecutors paint Palisades Fire suspect as a premeditated arsonist in opening statements
articles.description: Prosecutors paint Palisades Fire suspect as a premeditated arsonist in opening statements

articles.title: Ensure swift probe, strict action in cases of economic offences: Yogi
articles.description: Ensure swift probe, strict action in cases of economic offences: Yogi

articles.title: Among herostones and lost inscriptions
articles.description: The discovery made me realise that fragments of history could still be scattered across the village. I was not disappointed. Soon, I located another herostone depicting two brave dogs fighting a wild boar. I had only read about herostones erected for hunting dogs; here was one.

articles.title: 'Heroes of America, ICE': Trump signs $70B bill to supercharge deportations and border enforcement
articles.description: President Donald Trump signed a sweeping $70 billion immigration enforcement package, delivering a major victory for his administration's border security agenda and providing long-term funding for ICE and Border Patrol operations.

articles.title: S-I arrested for taking Rs 5k bribe in Bahraich
articles.description: Bahraich sub-inspector at Risia police station arrested by anti-corruption team for allegedly taking Rs 5,000 bribe to avoid adding charges and arrest.

articles.title: No individual data, Sebi to tweak AMC exec pay disclosure norms
articles.description: In a bold initiative, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) is looking to overhaul the reporting standards for executive compensation within asset management companies (AMCs). Rather than peering into the earnings of individual executives, the new proposal would shift focus to total remuneration for specific roles.

articles.title: UP adds 29 lakh voters for forthcoming panchayat polls
articles.description: Kheri Witnesses Max Increase; Highest Deletion In Ghazipur

articles.title: Look What I Found: Early Prime Day Deals on HP Computers and Printers
articles.description: We know what HP really stands for, but for the purposes of this story, we're going to say it's "Hot Prices" which can be found on some of its best-reviewed products on Amazon.

articles.title: Corporate India’s overseas FDI commitments halve in May
articles.description: In May, Indian businesses tightened their belts when it came to overseas investments, marking a notable decline from April's figures. A drop in guarantees, equity investments, and loans contributed to this trend.

articles.title: Shatrughan Sinha, Saayoni Ghosh - Surprise names in 19 TMC rebels list
articles.description: 19 Trinamool Congress (TMC) MPs have now reportedly signed a list of rebels. These include Saayoni Ghosh, Shatrughan Sinha, and Yusuf Pathan. Meanwhile, a parallel rebellion has also shaken the West Bengal Assembly, led by Ritabrata Banerjee.

articles.title: After strong onset, southwest monsoon to enter a sluggish phase in Kerala
articles.description: Kerala's southwest monsoon shows sluggishness after a strong start, with limited heavy rainfall expected in the coming weeks.

articles.title: From ‘Bigil’ to reality: Vijay launches Singappen special force for women’s safety in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: Women safety: Tamil Nadu's Singappen Special Force has been launched with 2,538 personnel to patrol hotspots, conduct safety audits and support women in distress. The Vijay government has allocated Rs 354 crore, with drones and body cameras.

articles.title: 65-year-old man succumbs to injuries after elephant attack in Wayanad
articles.description: A 65-year-old plantation worker, Raju, died after being attacked by a wild elephant near Kattikulam in Wayanad's Thirunelly region.

articles.title: Still Wrapping Food In Newspapers? FSSAI Warns How Toxic Ink, Germs And Chemicals Could Be Harming Your Health
articles.description: FSSAI renews warning against wrapping food in newspapers, citing toxic ink chemicals, heavy metals and microbial contamination, urges safer food grade packaging alternatives

articles.title: Is summer heat making you more aggressive?
articles.description: Research suggests that extreme heat can affect mood and behavior.

articles.title: Kim Soo-Hyun Returns After Clean Chit In Kim Sae-Ron Dating Scandal, To Resume Shoot After 1 Year
articles.description: Kim Soo-Hyun has been cleared of all allegations against him and YouTuber Kim Se-Ui has been accused of spreading false claims against the actor through YouTube broadcasts.

articles.title: Delhi battles surge in fire incidents, fatalities amid extreme heat
articles.description: Delhi faces a critical situation with a significant rise in fire incidents and fatalities due to the summer heat, says Fire Chief AK Malik. He has proposed mandatory smoke detectors. Authorities are also reviewing the city's heatwave action plan.

articles.title: ICC Player of the Month: Mushfiqur, Taijul, Airee nominated for May
articles.description: Bangladesh's Mushfiqur Rahim and Taijul Islam are nominated for the ICC Men's Player of the Month for May 2026 for their roles in the Test series win over Pakistan. Nepal's all-rounder Dipendra Singh Airee joins them for his CWC League 2 heroics.

articles.title: Govt. to have a relook on media curbs at Secretariat
articles.description: Amid accusations of restrictions imposed for mediapersons at the Secretariat, Chief Minister V.D.Satheesan said on Wednesday that the State government will need to take a relook at a 2018 circular during the tenure of the previous government which had led to the restrictions.

articles.title: Siddhanth Kapoor: Never wanted to be a quintessential Bollywood hero
articles.description: Actor Siddhanth Kapoor is successfully balancing his careers as an actor, DJ, and professional poker player, a path he finds exhilarating. He recently appeared in 'Mandala Murders' and prefers an unconventional, artistic approach to his acting career, shunning the typical Bollywood hero mold. Kapoor remains unfazed by external judgments and comparisons, prioritizing his peace of mind.

articles.title: Meloni Congratulates Modi On Becoming Longest-Serving Prime Minister Of India
articles.description: Giorgia Meloni hailed Narendra Modi's milestone as India's longest-serving elected PM, highlighting the India-Italy Special Strategic Partnership and future-focused collaboration.

articles.title: Starmer condemns Belfast anti-immigrant violence after knife attack; says ‘those responsible will feel full force of law’
articles.description: Starmer condemns Belfast anti-immigrant violence after knife attack; says ‘those responsible will feel full force of law’

articles.title: BizLink to acquire Interplex Datacom for $850 million to expand AI data center business
articles.description: BizLink will acquire Interplex Datacom from Blackstone-backed Ennovi for $850 million in cash, expanding its AI server, connectivity, and data center infrastructure capabilities.

articles.title: SIP stoppage ratio improves in May. Why market volatility shouldn't derail your SIP
articles.description: SIP closures remain elevated even as the stoppage ratio improves, highlighting the challenge of staying invested.

articles.title: Bloodshed at sunrise: Telangana man guns down wife after marital dispute, vanishes without a trace
articles.description: A 35-year-old woman was allegedly shot dead by her husband in Telangana's Medchal-Malkajgiri district following a marital dispute. Police have launched a manhunt for the absconding accused.

articles.title: ‘Can’t be mute spectator’: Supreme Court asks Kerala government to take charge of elephant in ownership row
articles.description: The Supreme Court noted that it was ‘truly unfortunate’ that the elephant Uttoly Raman was ‘subjected to commercial exploitation’ despite a court order.

articles.title: Pathaan Shah Rukh Khan hopes Alpha Alia Bhatt wins hearts after teaser release: ‘From breaking hearts to bones’
articles.description: After the latest in YRF's spy universe, Alpha's teaser was released on Wednesday, Shah Rukh Khan showered love on the lead stars, Alia Bhatt and Bobby Deol.

articles.title: £25 Drinks, VIP Altercation: New Revelations Shed Light on ‘Tipsy’ Ben Stokes’ Nightclub Controversy
articles.description: England Test captain Ben Stokes is under heavy scrutiny following his involvement in a nightclub brawl in London alongside teammate Gus Atkinson. The incident, a breach of the team's curfew, has jeopardized Stokes' captaincy and made his participation in the upcoming second Test unlikely.

articles.title: Calcutta High Court grants interim protection to ex-minister Aroop Biswas in Messi event case
articles.description: The case file was reopened after the BJP took office in West Bengal, based on the complaint of Satadru Dutta, the organiser of Messi’s event at Salt Lake Stadium.
